name: [Enclave Colonel Connor Kennedy] Fallout 3 OC
description:
Character based on an alternative Fallout 3 in which Colonel Autumn is killed by the player at the end of the game. However the Enclave isn't really beaten and instead seems to change tactics and work with the Brotherhood Outcasts meaning Broken Steel (the DLC) this shift is because of their new Colonel. Colonel Connor believes the Enclave should turn people against the Brotherhood and focus on truly fighting off the mutants. The Outcasts he promised to establish as a new branch of government reflecting the Origins of the Brotherhood from the US military. This tactic failed to work on Lyons and lead to a double down to attack Enclave forces, however they were cut off by the Outcasts and slaughtered leaving the Brotherhood on a defensive front to hold Project Purity and the Citadel without Liberty Prime.

First OC, and yes I based it on an alternate Fo3 where the Enclave are actually a threat. Feel free to play as anything from THE Lone Wanderer, to any random wastelander, or even a soldier under Colonel Connor Kennedy.
creator: UsernameJudJ
